data.executiveSummary: The frontend-web service experienced high CPU usage without any increase in error rates, indicating potential performance inefficiencies.

rootCause.title: High CPU Usage
rootCause.description: The service frontend-web showed consistent high CPU utilization of over 90%, but no error logs or high memory usage were detected to suggest a direct application malfunction or query issue, implying potential inefficiencies in current operations.

evidenceChain: Loki logs show 0 exceptions, indicating no error-related CPU spikes.
Prometheus metrics show average CPU usage at 94.99% over the last 30 minutes, indicating sustained high CPU utilization.

timeline.event: Start of observation period with CPU usage averaging at 94.99%.

data.impact: No errors reported; user experience is primarily affected by potential latency due to high CPU consumption.
